description: Composition Half sleeve shirt with red and white checks, made of 100% cotton, has a patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered brand logo, full length buttoned placket, godet inserts on the sides and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine/hand wash in cold water at 30 C with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron When it's Thursday and you want to wear something that's not formal, but not casual either, try this semi-formal checked shirt from scullers. The shirt looks fresh and crisp, and will keep you cool all day long. Pair it with corduroys for a relaxed look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
